parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the tremolo. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth of the tremolo, or the intensity of the volume fluctuations.
parameters-en.Shape: Changes the waveform of the tremolo. Higher values begin to impart a percussive, glitchy attack.
parameters-en.Vol Sens: Controls the tremolo effect's sensitivity to input level. Increasing Vol Sens causes louder input signals to speed up the tremolo and lower input signals to slow it down.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
